original_question: A very special island is inhabited only by knights and knaves. Knights always tell the truth, and knaves always lie. You meet 4 inhabitants: Avery, Mia, Jack, and James. Avery expressed that James is a knight if and only if Jack is a knave. Mia was heard saying, "James is a knight if and only if Mia is a knight". As Jack put it, "If Mia is a knight then James is a knight". James expressed that Mia is a knave if and only if Jack is a knight. So who is a knight and who is a knave?
